programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean battle over who should host Thanksgiving dinner and feelings get hurt; BJ cooks. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba

programme.title: The Christmas House
programme.desc: Working through some difficult decisions, a mother and father summon their two grown sons home for the holidays. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Where Are You, Christmas?
programme.desc: Addy wishes for a year without Christmas and wakes up in a black-and-white world. She must work together with the town mechanic to restore the holiday to all its glory. (Drama, Fantasy, Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas With a Kiss
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help with her family's Christmas Carnival, and romance ignites. A photo journalist curates a surprise reunion. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas Class Reunion
programme.desc: Reuniting at Christmastime for their 15-year high school reunion, two former classmates challenge each other to remember who they were, who they are, and who they want to be. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: The Most Colorful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A colorblind elementary school teacher meets an optometrist who helps bring color into his life in time for the holidays. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: The Santa Summit
programme.desc: At a Santa-themed holiday event, three teachers get their groove back, strengthen their friendship and unexpectedly find love along the way. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Catch Me if You Claus
programme.desc: Avery Quinn's shot at anchoring news clashes with a Santa-suited intruder, Chris, who insists he's Santa's son on a first Christmas mission. They unravel a career-making story together. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Holiday Road
programme.desc: Stranded at an airport, a group of holiday travelers agrees to rent a van for a road trip to Denver. When their unexpected journey leads them into uncharted territory, they must navigate a series of misadventures that brings them closer together. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.desc: Barbra Jean confesses that she has a big crush on her new marriage counselor (James Denton), and she asks Reba to help her fire him. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba decides to pursue a career in real estate, and Brock reluctantly allows her to handle the sale of his condo. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Christmas Wishes & Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: Weeks before Christmas, an interior designer is hired to decorate the estate of a wealthy businessman. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Ghosts of Christmas Always
programme.desc: Katherine, a Ghost of Christmas Present, must help one soul rediscover his Christmas spirit, but this year has something unusual in store. (Comedy drama, Fantasy, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: My Southern Family Christmas
programme.desc: Under the guise of a journalist, Campbell has a chance to get to know her biological father for the first time -- without him ever knowing who she really is. (Comedy drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Christmas With the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the younger brother of her boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas. (Drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: The Royal Nanny
programme.desc: Working under cover as a nanny, an MI5 agent must resist the charms of Prince Colin while keeping the royal family safe during Christmastime. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas Island
programme.desc: When a snowstorm diverts Kate's first private flight to Christmas Island, she must team up with an air traffic controller to secure her dream job as the family's pilot. (Drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two seemingly incompatible game designers in Chicago team up to create a romantic city-wide scavenger hunt to promote a hotel chain. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: A lawyer makes a deal with the heir to a development firm to spare her family's restaurant from demolition. However, she must spend the week posing as the legal counsel his father is demanding he hire in the wake of some costly mistakes. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S42E12 - Guy Fieri's travels with Antonia Lofaso on a culinary journey through Puerto Rico; in Old San Juan, they have a chicken-trifongo combo; a spot in Juncos serves plantain-picadillo lasagna and a stew made with pig's feet. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S46E12 - Guy Fieri's diving into dumplings from around the world; a Japanese joint in Cincinnati fires up meaty gyozas; a Nepalese spot in Oregon showcases its traditional fare; in Los Angeles, a Lebanese-Armenian oasis puts out a dumpling dish. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Save On Your Grocery Bills!
programme.desc: Tired of throwing away spoiled groceries? Keep food fresh 5X longer with the new PowerXL Duo Nutrisealer! (Cooking, Consumer)

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation. (Consumer)

programme.title: Ninja Woodfire Outdoor Grill
programme.desc: Meet the Shark Ninja Wood Fire Grill, with Master Grill, BBQ Smoke, and Air Fry outdoor capabilities. Powered by electricity and flavored by real burning wood pellets, Woodfire Technology allows you to easily create rich flavor you can see and taste. (Consumer)

programme.title: Ninja Woodfire Outdoor Grill
programme.desc: Meet the Shark Ninja Wood Fire Grill, with Master Grill, BBQ Smoke, and Air Fry outdoor capabilities. Powered by electricity and flavored by real burning wood pellets, Woodfire Technology allows you to easily create rich flavor you can see and taste. (Consumer)

programme.title: Shark CarpetXpertTM with StainStrikerTM 2-in-1 deep carpet cleaner with built-in spot & stain remover
programme.desc: Shark CarpetXpert with StainStriker, 2-in-1 deep carpet and upholstery cleaner with a handheld spot & stain eliminator, combines Shark's powerful suction & deep-cleaning innovation to deliver unbeatable deep carpet cleaning & tough stain elimination. (Consumer)

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: S14E11 - Valerie Bertinelli shares new meal ideas that are perfect for a crowd; she creates a rib sandwich with sauerkraut, creamy avocado pasta salad, a fruit board with hot honey yogurt dip and a refreshing coconut rum punch. (Cooking)

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: S14E1 - Valerie Bertinelli celebrates springtime with gallery-worthy dishes; she starts with a colorful roasted vegetable lentil salad and beautiful focaccia garden bread; then, she makes a stunning aqua pazza and a vibrant strawberry lemonade zebra cake. (Cooking)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E8 - Molly Yeh whips up a smorgasbord of delightful Swedish-inspired foods, like sweet rose semlor buns, savory Swedish meatballs and a big green salad with tiny Hasselback potatoes and horseradish dressing; she stacks up a Smorgastarta sandwich cake. (Cooking)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E4 - Molly Yeh cooks Korean-inspired foods; she makes sweet and spicy gochujang meatloaf sandwiches, cheesy Korean corn dogs and spicy blizzard fries; she finishes up with tangy orange bars with sesame crust. (Cooking, Documentary)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S32E12 - Ree Drummond makes blackberry crepe cake and strawberry prosecco peach jellies; for the freezer, there's shortcut cookie ice cream sandwiches and strawberry avocado pops. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S35E11 - Ree Drummond shares cool desserts for hot summer days, including cherry almond chocolate chunk ice cream, party-ready boozy blackberry lime whips, classic homemade dipped cones and fabulous frozen prosecco grapes. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S32E8 - Ree Drummond has summer entertaining covered with a Mediterranean feast; she's making marinated citrus salmon skewers and Greek yogurt dip served with a one-pan creamy cheesy orzotto; for dessert, baklava-inspired sundaes. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S19E5 - Beef skewers with greens and blue cheese mayo; shrimp and pineapple flatbreads with avocado cream; all-in-one pesto chicken skillet supper; blueberry lemon ricotta bruschetta. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S10E11 - Kardea Brown shares down-home, Southern eats from her South Carolina kitchen; she takes generations of family recipes and makes them her own as she cooks for family and friends at her Sea Island home. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S10E8 - Kardea Brown hosts an end-of-summer barbecue and serves steak burgers with hot pepper bacon jam and beer cheese, grilled corn with garlic butter, spicy sausage baked beans and homemade pineapple whip with toasted coconut and macadamia nuts. (Cooking)

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: S1E3 - Mary makes clean-up a breeze by whipping up four one-pot recipes. (Cooking)

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: S1E5 - Mary shows how versatile meal planning can be with four recipes. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: S18E5 - The Kitchen throws a summer block party bash; Jeff Mauro grills up crowd-pleasing smoked crispy drumsticks with maple butter hot sauce; TV host Sunny Hostin drops by with her side dish, a shrimp, corn and bean salad. (Cooking)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S23E25 - Guy honors America's men and women in uniform by inviting four military vets with a culinary second-calling; they'll be joining forces with the Messlords, a group of DDD chefs who travel the world cooking for our troops; a Flavortown obstacle course. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S29E6 - Guy Fieri invites four champion DDD chefs to prove who's the best; after a pair of one-on-one sudden death matches to make elevated comfort food, the final two chefs face the Food Pyramid's random restrictions to make the best high-end dinner. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S32E3 - Four chefs who feel the need for speed compete in Grocery Rush; in a race against the clock, they'll serve a brunch in only 20 minutes and make their favorite noodle dish using 10 ingredients or fewer. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S30E10 - Chef Antonia Lofaso gives four of Guy Fieri's superfans the chance to cook their favorite chef's recipes on his home turf, but Guy and Antonia don't go easy on the fans, serving up twisted games like a burger recipe with blanked-out instructions. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S34E11 - It's Fieri vs. Fieri as Guy and Hunter divide up six of their favorite all-star chefs to see whose team makes the best game day platter; in this tag-team challenge, only the chefs who do the initial shopping know what game day dishes they're making. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: S30E3 - Guy Fieri challenges three food truck teams to show off the food that made their trucks a hit. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: S17E1 - Tyler Florence welcomes nine food trucks to the NASA Johnson Space Center in Houston, TX, where their epic road trip for $50,000 across America's Gulf Coast begins. Tyler groups the teams into squads, and the bottom two face elimination. (Cooking, Travel, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Alex vs America
programme.desc: S2E2 - Eric Adjepong welcomes three talented brunch experts from New Hampshire, California and Arizona to challenge chef Alex Guarnaschelli in two intense rounds of cooking. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall and professional dancer Allison Holker Boss bring the moves as chefs Kimberly Plafke and Tiana Gee try to bring Bobby Flay a sweet defeat. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S24E11 - Marc Murphy and Chef Burrell want to rake Bobby over the coals and they'll have aid from Chef David Bancroft and BBQ champion Susie Bulloch. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: S17E1 - Tyler Florence welcomes nine food trucks to the NASA Johnson Space Center in Houston, TX, where their epic road trip for $50,000 across America's Gulf Coast begins. Tyler groups the teams into squads, and the bottom two face elimination. (Cooking, Travel, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Alex vs America
programme.desc: S2E2 - Eric Adjepong welcomes three talented brunch experts from New Hampshire, California and Arizona to challenge chef Alex Guarnaschelli in two intense rounds of cooking. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall and professional dancer Allison Holker Boss bring the moves as chefs Kimberly Plafke and Tiana Gee try to bring Bobby Flay a sweet defeat. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S24E11 - Marc Murphy and Chef Burrell want to rake Bobby over the coals and they'll have aid from Chef David Bancroft and BBQ champion Susie Bulloch. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: A seasoned chef is challenged to perform a seemingly impossible task without compromising the quality of the food. One week the chef must prepare dinner for 150 aboard a luxury locomotive, while the next could see him being asked to provide gourmet ballpark food at a party. Sometimes he must prepare the meal without proper kitchen equipment; other times he's got no food with which to work. There is always a time limit, and the chef's assistants usually are not cooking professionals. (Cooking)

programme.title: Lung Cancer From Asbestos?
programme.desc: Have you or a loved one been diagnosed with lung cancer? You may be entitled to compensation! (Consumer)

programme.title: House Stealing - The Latest Cyberthreat and How To Protect Your Home
programme.desc: Home Title Lock - Title Theft is Real and Your Equity is at Risk. Protect the Title to Your Home Today with America's Leader in Home Title Monitoring, Change Alerts and Title Restoration. (Consumer)

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming. (Shopping, Consumer, Variety)

programme.title: Who Stole My Life?
programme.desc: Every 3 seconds an American's identity is stolen. Just how safe is your 401k? Your bank account? Your home? Your credit? Crime Reporter Tom Morris Jr. investigates the identity theft epidemic. Find out how you can help protect yourself with LifeLock. (Consumer)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E7 - Molly Yeh hosts a lunch for the real farm spouses of wheat harvest; they'll enjoy sausage, squash, bean and chard soup, jumbo cheesy stuffed pitas and crispy spicy broccoli; everybody gets a sweet potato mini cake with cream cheese frosting. (Cooking)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E6 - Molly Yeh makes a slew of kid-friendly dishes that everyone will adore; she whips up grilled bacon, egg and cheese in a basket, a cozy chicken noodle hot dish and a breakfast combo: blueberry muffin smoothies with mini blueberry muffin garnishes. (Cooking)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E2 - Molly Yeh puts together a kids' brunch; she serves breakfast sausage. (Cooking)

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: S13E4 - Molly Yeh cooks Korean-inspired foods; she makes sweet and spicy gochujang meatloaf sandwiches, cheesy Korean corn dogs and spicy blizzard fries; she finishes up with tangy orange bars with sesame crust. (Cooking, Documentary)

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: S35E8 - The Kitchen diner dishes out ultimate comfort food classics, including Alex Guarnaschelli's indulgent Western Omelet Stuffed Peppers, Sunny Anderson's fired-up Disco Inferno Tots and Geoffrey Zakarian's flavorful Baklava Toast with Cottage Cheese. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: S36E3 - The Kitchen hosts take requests to make dishes for each other! Alex Guarnaschelli cooks up Pommes Sunny, Geoffrey Zakarian makes Katie Lee Biegel's dreams come true with Hachis Parmentier and Jeff Mauro makes his Reverse-Sear Ribeye just for Alex. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: S37E3 - Geoffrey Zakarian brings a fresh crab salad in endive; Sunny Anderson gets herbaceous with green goddess grilled lobster; Jeff Mauro adds some spice with chorizo and shrimp tacos. (Cooking)

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: S5E1 - Alex Guarnaschelli takes four chefs on an international trip without leaving the parking lot; they dish up Italian-style countryside cuisine and get a little bazaar with Moroccan food before one chef says bonjour to a year's worth of groceries. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: S5E6 - Alex Guarnaschelli brings drive-thru to the parking lot as four chefs grill up some killer burgers; an ice cream truck pulls up. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: S5E7 - Alex Guarnaschelli turns the tables as celebrity judges Jet Tila, Maneet Chauhan, Antonia Lofaso and Eddie Jackson bring their culinary skills to the parking lot. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: S4E13 - Alex Guarnaschelli challenges the chefs to make boardwalk bites; they cook up light and bright California coastal dishes, and the final two chefs make bonfire desserts. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S28E3 - Things heat up in this summertime battle as chefs Phelix Gardner and Enrika Williams try to make a splash with a win in Bobby Flay's kitchen; Bobby uses his chef knives to try and slash Eddie Jackson and Ted Allen's summer fun. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S30E5 - Chefs Trisha Perez Kennealy and Cesar Aldrete face each other in a battle of strip steaks; their goal is to take down Bobby Flay with the help of Anne Burrell and Josh Capon. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S32E9 - Chefs Maneet Chauhan and Brooke Williamson swing by Bobby Flay's kitchen with a drop challenge to erase him off the board, while chefs Jocelyn Law-Yone and Rasheeda Purdie school Bobby on their signature dishes. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S21E2 - It's a roller coaster of a battle when Noah Cappe teams up with Anne Burrell to choose between Los Angeles' acclaimed chef Mark Peel and Brooklyn's Nick Williams and all they want is to see Bobby Flay throw his arms up in defeat. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: S2E7 - Jesse Palmer celebrates Discovery's Shark Week on the sandy shores by challenging the bakers to make shark bite cookie bars in the shape of beach items. Then, the bakers protect their sweets from the majestic Great White by making shark cage desserts. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer lands in the Big Apple for some finale fireworks and the bakers create red, white and woo-hoo desserts for his backyard BBQ; the one baker who can blow the judges away with their exploding fireworks cake will take home the $25,000 prize. (Cooking, Competition Reality)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S35E5 - Eddie Jackson and Maneet Chauhan pull out all the stops to help chefs Bernard Bennett and Lena Le roll out a victory over Bobby Flay. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S31E4 - Buddies Anne Burrell and Marc Murphy bring in international cuisine expert chefs Ashten Garrett and Nasser Jaber to challenge Bobby Flay to a global gauntlet. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S28E1 - "Chopped" judge Alex Guarnaschelli teams up with "Chopped Sweets" judge Elizabeth Chambers to give Bobby Flay some bittersweet memories; they recruit chefs Leanne Mascoli and Melanie Moss, who are sweet on walking away with a win. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S30E8 - Amy Sedaris teams up with Michael Symon to take Bobby Flay down; Kristin Beringson and Amanda Salas are ready to dish out a loss. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Taylor has a large bump at the base of her spine that is far more dangerous than she realizes. John jokes about a hip lump, but it turns out that it is no laughing matter. Noelle had her ears stretched as a teenager, but now wants them repaired. (Repeat). (Reality, Health & Lifestyle)

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A history of Walt Disney World in Florida examines its four parks: the Magic Kingdom, Epcot, Disney-MGM Studios and Disney's Animal Kingdom. Included: the rides and audio animatronics. (Repeat). (Documentary, Science, Tech & Gaming)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A struggling cartoon studio creates one of the most recognizable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch and through a journey of failure, betrayal, innovation, and guts, becomes an American icon and the foundation of an iconic media empire. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film. It's Disney's magic combination of passion, brilliance, and tech innovation that gives rise to the billion-dollar business of animated films. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first Theme Park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Amidst financial troubles, Disney turns to licensing to bring their characters off the screen and into the hands of millions. Mickey becomes the first celebrity face to grace a cereal box as the licensing of Disney products becomes a lucrative industry and the gold standard for multimedia corporations all over the world. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited Theme Park. It began in secret as "Project X," and after being dogged by personal tragedy and construction delays, when Walt Disney World finally opens it's a triumph of imagination, technology, and a dream. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers. This is the story of how, since their earliest days with Walt himself, Imagineers have turned the impossible into reality, creating thrilling mass entertainment experiences and changing the world in the process. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: In the middle of the twentieth century, a small piece of plastic transforms the world of commerce as Diners' Club, Bank of America, and American Express compete to redefine how people pay for everything, launching the $6 trillion credit card business. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: The evolution of America's most beloved sports of baseball, basketball and football are made possible by the innovations of sporting goods pioneers named Spalding, Wilson, and the Rawlings brothers. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: In the 1950s, rival electronics companies aim to make music portable for the first time ever. What follows is a decades-long rivalry that prompts the creation of iconic products like the Pocket Radio, Cassette Tape, Walkman and the CD, alongside the rise of two of the biggest companies in the world. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two visionaries breathe new life into the hotel industry in America and the world by setting the modern standard for hospitality. Despite setbacks, economic downturns, and international conflict, these rivals will stop at nothing to be number one. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two software executives in California redefine the video rental industry and take on Blockbuster with their online subscription service, Netflix. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck car salesman has the visionary idea to start the first rental car company in America, and when he joins forces with cab company owner John Hertz, they spread their revolutionary business across the country. But when WWII veteran Warren Avis starts his own rental car company, fierce competition between the two gives rise to a new industry with a $100 billion annual market. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two sneaker companies become industry titans through a decades long battle for global dominance, as they unleash iconic footwear that will bring sneakers mainstream and make them part of the fabric of American culture. (New). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Icons That Built America
programme.desc: A struggling New York actor, brushed aside because of his looks and speech impediment, bets on himself to write, and star in a movie. By challenging the ideas of what it means to be a leading man at the time, he gives himself a fighting chance in Hollywood. At the same time, a young Austrian bodybuilder must overcome his own hurdles and outside discrimination to utilize his strength and power in creating a name for himself in America. (New). (Documentary)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America

(Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

Cleopatra's body and final resting place have been lost without a trace for over 2,000 years, leaving the world's top archaeologists baffled. New evidence may finally uncover Cleopatra's missing tomb. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: In 1587, a group of settlers land off the coast of North Carolina on Roanoke Island to establish the first English Colony in America. But only a few years later, the 115 men, women and children seemingly vanish without a trace, leaving only cryptic clues. The search to find out their fate has endured for over 400 years. Can new technology finally tell us what happened to the Lost Colony of Roanoke? (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Experts research and theorize what happened to the infamous Japanese war booty treasures. Many believe that hundreds of billions worth of plundered gold bars, gems, and other treasures were buried in various locations in the Philippines. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries

Examining if the recent string of strange encounters and phenomena get us closer to answering the age old questions, are we alone in the universe; what tools are we using to hunt for signs of life in outer space; and is it possible that evidence of alien intelligence has actually reached planet Earth. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: Venus, our nearest planetary neighbor, is a glowing yellow orb with massive volcanoes, poisonous clouds, and a surface temperature hot enough to melt lead. Its appearance has fascinated us for centuries, but it raises questions about whether Venus is our evil twin or a warning about Earth's future. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe

programme.title: Just 2 Degrees

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: S1E1 - Spring: Across the continent, spring brings warmth and renewal. For some animals, courtship rituals begin to heat up as battles for dominance break out. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: S1E2 - Summer: The summer is a time of plenty, giving animals the chance to reap nature's rewards. No one knows this better than parents challenged with raising new offspring. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: S1E3 - Autumn: As autumn begins, change sweeps across America. It's make-or-break time for the animals that have their preparation put to the test before the cold sets in. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: S1E4 - Winter: As plunging temperatures bring nature into winter, some animals flee south to find milder climes. But others are determined to tough out the brutal cold. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Surviving The Amazon
programme.desc: S1E5 - Jungle Juniors: Each year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally, and almost all are babies. Follow these little ones as they learn to survive alone. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Dogs: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: S1E1 - Man's Best Friend: Patrick Aryee investigates the astonishing history and evolution of dogs and our pets' weird, wild and wonderful relatives. (1 of 3)

programme.title: Dogs: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: S1E2 - The Americas: Patrick Aryee heads to the Americas, home to tree-climbing canines, the hardy little Arctic fox and the majestic grey wolf. (2 of 3)

programme.title: Dogs: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: S1E3 - Asia and Africa: Patrick Aryee follows a pack of African hunting dogs and meets a fox with ears longer than its legs. Plus, a jackal's cunning is caught on camera. (3 of 3)

programme.title: Dehesa- Forest Of The Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: S1E1 - A celebration of the Spanish Dehesa's wilderness and wildlife. Witness a unique ecosystem as it has never seen before. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Dehesa- Forest Of The Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: S1E2 - A celebration of the Spanish Dehesa's wilderness and wildlife. Witness a unique ecosystem as it has never been seen before. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: S1E5 - Badalo Is Missing: Watch the team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, before continuing to track Badalo - who has moved deeper into the flooded forest. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global...
programme.desc: ...Adventure: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the stunning Great Barrier Reef to the rainforests of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global...
programme.desc: ...Adventure - Home Planet: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the Great Barrier Reef to the jungles of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global...
programme.desc: ...Adventure: The Rise of Nature. David Attenborough explores the rise of life on our planet, from the explosion of first life on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to life today.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: S1E5 - Badalo Is Missing: Watch the team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, before continuing to track Badalo - who has moved deeper into the flooded forest. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Patrick Aryee's Wild World
programme.desc: S1E1 - New & Exclusive. Bison: Join Patrick in the Great Plains of North America, as he explores the intricate web that connects grasses and dung beetles to bison and the grizzly bear. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Patrick Aryee's Wild World
programme.desc: S1E2 - New & Exclusive. Salmon: Patrick is in British Columbia for the annual salmon run, which not only ensures the species' survival but also sustains the entire rainforest ecosystem. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Patrick Aryee's Wild World
programme.desc: S1E3 - New & Exclusive. Jaguar: Patrick is in Costa Rica to witness the annual mass nesting of sea turtles, as well as the predatory jaguars that come in for the kill. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Patrick Aryee's Wild World
programme.desc: S1E4 - New & Exclusive. Monkeys: In Costa Rica, insect numbers are in decline. Patrick heads deep into the rainforest to find out just how far and wide this change is being felt. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global...
programme.desc: ...Adventure: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the stunning Great Barrier Reef to the rainforests of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Global...
programme.desc: ...Adventure: The Rise of Nature. David Attenborough explores the rise of life on our planet, from the explosion of first life on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to life today.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Wild
programme.desc: S2E2 - Zambia's Peaceful Primates: Join researchers who are out to understand why Kinda baboons have turned their backs on aggression and are starting to lead more peaceful lives. (S2, ep 2)

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: S14E11 - Set in Dorset's Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre, this documentary series follows the day-to-day dramas of looking after over 240 primates. (S14, ep 11)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel falls under the mind control of Azrael and the Smurfs must help to set him free. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy builds Lazy a special alarm clock to keep him awake, but it keeps the rest of the Smurfs awake as well. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: After catching Clumsy, Gargamel tempts him with a magic amulet that makes his clumsiness disappear. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette and Blossom try to make Grouchy smile by taking him on a camping trip. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: Where's Waldo?
programme.desc: S2E5 - Odlulu is on the hunt for the Wind Key so she can use it as the world's greatest hair dryer; however, the Wind Key is too powerful for Odlulu to handle, so Waldo, Wenda and Whitebeard head to Norway to locate the key before Odlulu can find it. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy, Educational)

programme.title: Where's Waldo?
programme.desc: S2E6 - Odlulu uses the Shadow Puppet Key to create her own living shadows; when her mischievous shadows run off with the key, the Wanderers learn the only way to reattach the shadows is to touch them with the key. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy, Educational)

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: S1E56 - MIGHTY MIKE is a maverick CGI series, featuring the slapstick, dialogue-free antics of a pug called Mike, whose level of photorealistic realism has genuinely surpassed existing standards in the genre. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Comedy)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E36 - When the Ringmaster catches some New Guinea Singing Dogs to put them in her new show, Matt pushes Jia to go beyond the limits of her Pianophone. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E37 - Princess Petswiper captures Pink Flamingos and hitches them to her carriage, but they need to be tamed before they will do her bidding. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E38 - When MacTrapp captures a cheetah for his super-fast zoo, Jia asks Matt to upgrade her boots, which she pushes beyond their limits and threatens the mission. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E39 - MacTrapp captures a red kangaroo for his zoo with a super- powered magnetic boomerang! While the trapper encounters some difficulties with the marsupial, our heroes try to overcome the challenge created by MacTrapp's device. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Arthur

programme.title: Beep & Mort

programme.title: Brave Bunnies
programme.desc: S1E34 - The bunnies make an unscheduled stop when their bunny bus conks out; while Ma and Pa fix it, Bop and Boo bump into Kit, their kangaroo friend; Kit shows off Beeper, her new stopwatch. (Children, Adventure, Educational)

programme.title: Brave Bunnies
programme.desc: S1E35 - Bop and Boo are ready to fly their kite on the plains; a young frog named Arnold hops by and is surprised to see their frowns; the bunnies grumble that they don't like rain. (Children, Adventure, Educational)

programme.title: Brave Bunnies
programme.desc: S1E36 - In the mountains, the bunnies wake to find another tent near their camp; Bop and Boo meet a tortoise, Shelly, who invites them to join their scavenger hunt. (Children, Adventure, Educational)

programme.title: Caillou

programme.title: Rev & Roll
programme.desc: S1E18 - Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret; she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day; but when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day. (Animated, Children, Adventure)

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: S4E21 - A snowstorm rips the solar panels off the log cabin and Grizzy can no longer watch TV or enjoy the comforts of home but he has a brilliant idea. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Comedy)

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: S1E53 - Louise draws a bunch of hearts and flowers on Mike during a makeup game, to Mike's horror. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Comedy)

programme.desc: France is up against Belgium in the round of last 16 of the 2024 European Championships. France won each of its four major tournament matches against Belgium, including 1-0 in the 2018 World Cup semi-finals. Samuel Umtiti scored the winning goal. (Soccer)

programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Portugal takes on Slovenia in the round of last 16 of the 2024 European Championships. The only previous meeting between these teams was a 2-0 friendly win for Slovenia last March in Ljubljana. Adam Gnezda Cerin and Timi Elšnik scored the goals. (Soccer)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: The Ross kids head to summer camp in this spinoff of "Jessie." Emma, Ravi and Zuri spend the summer at Maine's Camp Kikiwaka, where their parents met when they were teenagers. The kids aren't used to being in the great outdoors, so cheerful head counselor Lou and camp heartthrob Xander help the siblings adjust to being at camp and show them the ropes of outdoor life. While Emma and Ravi become counselors in training, learning how to be responsible role models for younger campers, Zuri becomes friends with a couple of the kids at the camp, studious Tiffany and compulsive liar Jorge. Together, the Ross children settle into their new lives as they adapt to their summer home away from home. (Children, Sitcom)

programme.desc: S4E4 - The Raneys create their first-ever self-automated homestead in the fierce Alaskan wilderness to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty. (Reality, Outdoors, Home improvement)

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: S4E3 - Marty embarks on an ambitious, off-grid hydropower system after Tennessee storms obliterate the Reathifords' power source; Matt creates a meat smoker, but a surprise accident leads to a construction site injury for one of the Raneys. (Reality, Outdoors, Home improvement)

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: S5E5 - The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead is in utter disrepair; beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in, but it may not be able to withstand a 7.2 earthquake. (Reality, Outdoors, Home improvement)

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: S5E4 - Marty is hit with a bombshell; the old well he's come to fix has already claimed its first victim; to set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply and sustainable power. (Reality, Outdoors, Home improvement)

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: S2E6 - A pit bull puppy learns to walk; Chinese crested puppies investigate a turtle; a newborn collie overcomes her shyness. (Animals)

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Dr. Vasilescu navigates a rescue dog's heart murmur after also showing signs of dental discomfort; Dr. Schwartz attempts to uncover the reason behind a cat's ear pain after losing part of his tail to frostbite. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Entertainment)

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: S5E4 - A gorilla must undergo a critical root canal to fix its tooth problem; a red-crested turaco chick fledges the nest; a pair of puma cubs travel to their new home at the Queens Zoo. (Reality, Animals)

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: S3E1 - Beloved camel Max develops a large abscess on the top of his head; a marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal; a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is brought to the zoo for a health check. (Reality, Animals)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S8E4 - Adventurous Californian couple want to find a new dog to replace their recently passed one; Matt must hurry to save puppies trapped under railroad ties; sad news comes to Villalobos. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: S5E7 - A magical castle treehouse to inspire artistic endeavors; partying is the task for Pete and his crew in eastern Nebraska. (Reality, House/garden, How-to, Outdoors)

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: S5E6 - Pete builds a clubhouse for a camp for children battling cancer; a crow's nest outpost and peek-a-boo roof for full interaction with nature. (Reality, House/garden, How-to, Outdoors)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S4E1 - A pit bull suffers a raccoon attack; an aggressive ferret; the vets test their pig-whispering skills at an animal rescue; the doctors have a surprise announcement for their wives. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S5E1 - Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts; Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament; Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: S2E6 - The search is on for a missing boater who may have suffered a stroke on Corney Lake; wildlife agents deploy as a hurricane makes landfall, rescuing stranded survivors from the floodwaters and dispensing lifesaving supplies. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: S2E2 - Wildlife agents join a manhunt for an armed fugitive on the bayou; a nervous young hunter reveals a serious violation; a night shrimping bust leads to a familiar and unrepentant culprit. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Louisiana Law

programme.title: Wardens of the North

programme.desc: S1E7 - Boog and Elliot open up a hair salon, and soon find that their new enterprise has attracted the attention of local gangster Woolly the Bully; Karla is forced to reveal her greatest talent and greatest shame to everyone. (Animated, Comedy, Adventure)

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Shasha & Milo
programme.desc: S1E6 - Milo is looking forward to spending some quality time with Uncle Leo without Shasha. (Animated, Adventure)

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two young kids become spies in attempt to save their parents, who are ex-spies, from an evil mastermind. Armed with a bag of high tech gadgets and out-of-this world transportation, Carmen (Alexa Vega) and Juni (Daryl Sabara) will bravely jet through the air, dive under the seas and crisscross the globe in a series of thrilling adventures on a mission to save their parents ... and maybe even the world. (Family, Adventure, Action, Comedy)

programme.title: Domino Masters
programme.desc: S1E2 - Four new teams face off in a domino toppling and chain reaction tournament with holiday themes; the teams are given custom elements to incorporate into their Rube Goldberg-style topples. (Game show)

programme.desc: S3E5 - Laura's (Kellie Shanygne Williams) behavior suddenly changes when she meets Carl's new partner (Perry Moore); surf's up for Steve (Jaleel White). (Sitcom)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: S5E17 - Barry tries to break up Beverly's group of friends, which results in a turf war over the backyard; Adam's attempts to trick Murray into loving theater backfire. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: Now full fledged Spy Kids, Carmen (Alexa Vega) and Juni (Daryl Sabara) Cortez are back for another James Bond style adventure. Their newest mission takes them to a distant island where they take on a mysterious man and his imaginative creatures. But this time, they also have to fight the forces of rival sibling Spy Kids, Gary (Matt O'Leary) and Gerti (Emily Osment) Giggles, as they head right into a trap that will test each and every spy in the Cortez family. programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: This early morning show is for people who enjoy the information they get from "FOX and Friends" but want it earlier. Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus host the show that requires them to get up at the crack of dawn. They report on the day's headlines while offering viewers the latest information regarding health, legal, political and lifestyle topics. Consider this the pregame show for the main "FOX and Friends" show that follows it. (Newsmagazine)

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Approximately 51 percent of the U.S. population is made up of women, but on "Outnumbered" the female advantage jumps to a 4-1 ratio. The hourlong show features a rotating panel of four women and one man discussing the day's headlines from various perspectives. In addition to the top news of the hour, the panelists discuss leading pop culture and relationship issues making headlines that day. Regular FNC and FBN contributors appearing on the show on a rotational basis include Harris Faulkner, Meghan McCain and Pete Hegseth. (News)

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts. (News)

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts. (News)

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum has been part of the Fox News family for a number of years but made the jump to prime time while chronicling the first 100 days of President Trump's administration. Now she's branching out to cover all of the happenings in the nation's capital on "The Story." She keeps viewers up-to-date on the critical decisions, political maneuvers and key developments coming out of D.C. Through interviews with guests and reports from the network's roster of correspondents, MacCallum goes in-depth on the stories that matter to viewers. (News)

programme.title: Your World With Neil Cavuto
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil Cavuto, FNC's business news senior vice president, this program covers the latest business news stories, in addition to giving analysis on how the stock market moved through the day. It also covers political stories and how they may affect the markets. (Bus./financial, News)

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: The weekday opinion show is a roundtable ensemble of five rotating Fox News personalities who discuss and debate the top news stories, controversies and issues of the day, from politics to pop culture. Some of the network's featured people who appear include Greg Gutfeld, Dana Perino and Jesse Watters. The hosts conclude each show by selecting a topic of their choice for the "One More Thing" segment. (Talk, Interview, Politics)

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier hosts this live weeknight newscast that places an emphasis on political stories from Washington, D.C. (Talk, News)

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham is one of the most listened to women on political talk radio in the country. Ingraham earned a B.A. degree at Dartmouth college and a Juris Doctor degree at the University of Virginia School of Law. She took the knowledge from her J.D. degree and applied it to serve as a litigator and Supreme Court law clerk. She is also the best-selling author of five books. Tune in to watch"The Ingraham Angle," as the program serves to discuss the issues that are being overlooked and other issues that are causing turmoil in the United States. (News)

programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the country to give Americans a show where straight talk is the only talk. (Talk)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: S17E9 - Three 14-day fan challenge survivalists return to conquer 21 days in the dense South American jungle. But when they are hit with torrential rains, they must evacuate from life-threatening flash floods. (Reality, Outdoors, Adventure)

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: S6E6 - Tea and liquor; two beverages Americans will fight a rebellion for; Mark, Digger, and Tim judge as three distillers compete to turn America's duo of hard won drinks into one top selling spirit for a chance to win the title of Master Distiller. (Reality)

programme.title: Auction Kings
programme.desc: S2E14 - A vintage fortune telling scale; taxidermy animals; an impressive collection of baseball cards. (Reality, Auction)

programme.title: Scott Martin Challenge
programme.desc: Scott Martin breaks records on Lake Okeechobee for the Bassmaster Open. (Outdoors)

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly
programme.desc: Michigan's famous Hex hatch and its amazing steelhead runs. (Outdoors)

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George and Captain Jim Willcox head into the Islamorada backcountry; hoping to cash in on the Spanish mackerel winter migration run, they board George's Mako 214 for fast action, fine eating, and light tackle fun. (Outdoors, Fishing)

programme.title: Life on the Water
programme.desc: S2E10 - Many people in Florida make their living on the water, and in this episode, we meet a collection of Sunshine State characters. (Documentary, Boat, Travel)

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: S14E6 - Capts. Scott and Steve fill up their Yeti cooler to make a big run from Plantation Boat Mart in the 36' Invincible into the green Gulf waters, hoping to do battle with some sea monsters. (Outdoors)

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: S19E12 - Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head to the Everglades' Flamingo grass flats for some redfish and snook fishing with classic spoon lures. (Fishing)

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures
programme.desc: S28E13 - Capts. Rick and Ridge Murphy team up with Heroes on the Water to fish for bass in the Everglades by airboat; joining them is veteran and Lt. Alfredo Arevalo with his daughter A.J. (Outdoors, Fishing)

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: S1E2 - Tormented by childhood memories of abduction, a woman discovers an implant in her body; a sailor captures lights over the Pacific Ocean that he believes are alien craft, and a couple finds unusual footprints in the woods. (Science fiction)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E3 - Sam gets a tick bite in the worst spot imaginable; Terra encourages Lynsey to quit; desperate for protection, Adam and Heather start a shelter rebuild; Malorie stalks a massive caiman; The Badlands send a survivalist home. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E4 - A newly-formed tribe quickly works together to stalk and kill a caiman; the pressure to trek forty miles to extraction pushes two teams to make risky migrations; a survivalist is on the brink when medics discover parasites in their digestive system. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E5 - A massive food win buoys Terra and their whole team; on the heels of a caiman kill, Malorie sets her sights on a bigger prize; Heather is shocked when Adam tells her he has not been sharing food; a scorching migration could end Heather's challenge. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E6 - Far from extraction, Kaiela leads her team on a punishing trek that puts her challenge at risk; Adam and Heather's smoldering tension makes the new camp choose sides; desperate for protein, a risky survival choice pushes Heather to her breaking point. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E7 - The remaining survivalists join forces; when the group splinters to hunt resources, it leads to a big protein win but creates tension between Lynsey and Terra; Nathan uses a primitive cooking method to maximize the meat. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: S10E8 - Facing an unprecedented two-day extraction, the final eight survivalists hunt, fish and trap potential food; an emergency overnight in the jungle causes fears and tensions to flare; Malorie's struggles cause medics to step in. (Outdoors, Adventure, Reality)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: S6E6 - An endurance athlete and a stay-at-home dad team up in a rugged Belize jungle to contend with jaguars, venomous snakes, falling trees and powerful storms. (Reality, Outdoors, Adventure)

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: S17E2 - Chris McCully embarks on a three-person, 15-hour diving marathon while Kris Kelly panics when the Mistress takes on water; Vernon and Emily both try new, unconventional divers; Mr. Gold successfully returns to work on the Myrtle Irene. (Reality, Adventure)

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: S6E4 - The team tests "Viral Videos" from the Internet. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: S7E4 - The team tests YouTube myths; giant ball of Legos; the explosive power of match heads. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: S6E5 - Adam and Jamie test a phone book fable; Kari, Grant and Tory test a fishy tale of Hollywood. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: S16E6 - Questions about congestion; testing shockwave jams; roundabout vs. four-way stop sign; driving or flying; changing lanes. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: S5E5 - Adam and Jamie push the limits when it comes to speed. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S1E2 - Officers discover firearms that may be intended for a Mexican drug lord; a load of Fentanyl hidden in an ice cream freezer; a truck driver transporting puppies is under scrutiny; a wanted woman is detained in Brownsville. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S1E8 - Meth is found inside the walls of a trailer; brothers are caught smuggling prescription medication; illicit Mexican delicacies are confiscated at the border. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S2E8 - Dirty cartel money is found hidden in a truck; an intoxicated minor requires medical treatment; a man tries to enter the US with a false visa, and two sisters are caught smuggling meds; a large quantity of cocaine is found hidden inside trash bags. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: S5E7 - Buying a newer home isn't the Cordray's norm, but adding their iconic character, style and functionality never gets old; they build a privacy fence for the deck, a herringbone design focal wall, and raise and make over the original kitchen cabinets. (Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: S1E3 - In Ventura, Calif., Lindsey is called to renovate an old motor lodge, and the owner's sons need to be taught how to run the place; Lindsey's up for the challenge, but it's a tall task. (Home improvement)

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: S6E5 - The Cordrays bring beauty, impeccable design and increased value to this renovation by adding a bedroom, vintage doors to separate the kitchen from the living space and retro tile found under the house for a one-of-a-kind backsplash. (Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: S5E7 - Buying a newer home isn't the Cordray's norm, but adding their iconic character, style and functionality never gets old; they build a privacy fence for the deck, a herringbone design focal wall, and raise and make over the original kitchen cabinets. (Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: S2E4 - In Eureka Springs, Ark., a mother and son are out of ideas and almost out of hope; Lindsey needs to teach them to embrace modern business practices and a smart new design or their mountain town motel won't make it. (Home improvement)

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: S8E7 - The team gets creative while trying to make something worthwhile out of a lackluster cabin. (Reality, How-to, Home improvement, Documentary)

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: S8E13 - The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of the shed with walls; they finish off the new space by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood; Mark explores a German house barn and visits a log home built on a cliff. (Reality, How-to, Home improvement, Documentary)

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: S21E16 - Exploring wetlands; indoor air quality testing; repainting an exterior concrete foundation. (House/garden, How-to, Home improvement)

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: S21E17 - Upgrading a fireplace; different landscape tools and how to maintain them for spring; building a bathtub tray out of zebrawood. (House/garden, How-to, Home improvement)

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: S3E9 - Tamara takes on a 1979 property with a confusing style; sight lines get opened in the living room and kitchen; a midcentury modern design emerges with elements like shiplap and brass. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: S4E7 - Tamara and her team transform a charming 1927 Tudor into an absolute masterpiece, complete with a new, more comfortable, more functional and colorful kitchen and expanded main bathroom. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: S4E1 - Tamara and her dad help a recent widow, who loves to cook for her family, design her dream kitchen; Tamara takes a small galley space and turns it into a chef's giant dream kitchen, perfect for entertaining large family gatherings. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: S3E8 - Tamara updates a 1978 Tudor home by brightening up and enlarging the dark kitchen; she then improves the flow in the master bedroom and transforms the basement into an awesome game room where the family can relax. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: S3E7 - Tamara renovates a 1908 Shirtwaist home that was abandoned by the previous renovator; she refurbishes original corbels for the walls and builds a custom range hood for the open plan kitchen, then creates a charming den using wainscoting and tile. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S5E14 - A wounded veteran and his girlfriend call on Chip and Jo to help them convert their house in Waco into a dreamy farmhouse; while the land is beautiful and majestic, the house is small and built inside an existing barn. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S3E9 - Newlyweds want to find a first house with three bedrooms, a big kitchen, and a big backyard in the Mountainview area of Waco, Texas. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S2E1 - A couple tours three houses in Waco, Texas, and although their wishlist is small, so is their budget. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S3E17 - A couple raising a young family hope to find a 3-4 bedroom house with a large backyard in Waco, Texas; strange abodes visited include the Chicken House, the Outhouse and the Wizard of Waco house. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E6 - NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E7 - A family of three moving from Colorado to Texas wants a slower pace and a big-acreage home with modern flair, unavailable where they're coming from. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S3E2 - After touring three houses in Waco, Texas, a couple want to buy one that is close to Baylor University. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S5E4 - Chip and Joanna take on a historical project for Courtney and Joey Scrivano, who are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby; the 1927 Tudor home is outdated and lacks a true master suite. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S3E16 - A single foster mother wants to find the ideal environment to raise children, and gets help from her twin sister for the decision. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S5E9 - Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son; special guest First Lady Laura Bush helps with the finishing touches. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E10 - Chip and Joanna's longtime friend Brett has a dream of living on a houseboat on Lake Waco, but his tight budget and space create plenty of design challenges. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E12 - San Diego transplants Mary and Dustyn are on the hunt for their family's dream home in Waco, Texas, and they're looking for a four-bedroom with a large yard and open space for hosting. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S5E9 - Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son; special guest First Lady Laura Bush helps with the finishing touches. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E10 - Chip and Joanna's longtime friend Brett has a dream of living on a houseboat on Lake Waco, but his tight budget and space create plenty of design challenges. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E12 - San Diego transplants Mary and Dustyn are on the hunt for their family's dream home in Waco, Texas, and they're looking for a four-bedroom with a large yard and open space for hosting. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S3E16 - A single foster mother wants to find the ideal environment to raise children, and gets help from her twin sister for the decision. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: S8E9 - The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tenn.; Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn. (Reality, How-to, Home improvement, Documentary)

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: S8E1 - While salvaging barn wood, the crew has to deal with a massive Ohio barn's dangerous roof; Mark Bowe finds a flooring company with a new idea for old wood; later, he visits an incredible timber frame home. (Reality, How-to, Home improvement, Documentary)

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: S21E18 - Replacing a leaking gas oven; creating a pollinator garden at home; applying wireless electricity technology to electric vehicle chargers in future homes. (House/garden, How-to, Home improvement)

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: S5E2 - A clogged aerator on a bathroom faucet is replaced; caring for houseplants; fixing a squeaky subfloor underneath carpeting. (House/garden, How-to, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S1E8 - Having split their time between Nashville, Tenn., and Destin, Fla., a couple hopes to get their sons out into the sunshine permanently. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S5E20 - A married couple living in Washington, DC are looking for a weekend getaway in the nautical hotspot of Lusby, Maryland; waterfront property is pricy but they're hoping to find a deal. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E1 - Chip and Joanna Gaines go big with their next project to revive a lake house estate stuck in the 1960s; Chip tackles major structural room shifts to accommodate Jo's blend of two very different design styles. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E2 - Chip and Jo come up with ways to highlight the outdoors in the living space and make it a feature of Jo's mid-century modern and Spanish revival design, as well as maximize the cliffside view of the property. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E3 - Chip and Jo focus on custom millwork projects designed to reinvigorate the home's mid-century modern character in nearly every room of the house; Chip and Jo also decide to add a water feature to the outdoor courtyard. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E4 - Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with custom metal and plaster texture in the primary bath and volcanic ash floor tile in the recreation room; Jo questions a decision about copper gutters. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E5 - Jo finalizes the design for a show-stopping mid-century modern staircase for the grand entry; Chip restores the home's original hardwood flooring and installs one-of-a-kind features that define the kitchen, library and outdoor areas. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: S1E6 - Chip wraps up construction and Jo starts styling the house; Jo plans a big surprise for Chip on reveal day; special guests Tim Tebow and Robert Griffin III. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S5E6 - A Maryland couple searches for a beachfront property in Hampton, Virginia, where they can make seaside memories with their daughters. She looks for ways to cut costs on the renovation without sacrificing style. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S6E6 - To celebrate their anniversary, a couple decides it's finally time to purchase and renovate the beach house of their dreams in the Outer Banks of North Carolina. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S5E22 - A Connecticut house flipper is on the hunt for a property with a beach view that he can call his own; after years of renovating houses for others to use, he is ready to find a vacation home that he and his family can escape to for some quality time. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S7E5 - A single mother who spent her childhood on Nantasket Beach searches for a home along the shores of Hull, Massachusetts; she hopes to find an affordable property she can rehab to create the same cherished memories she had for her children. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S5E8 - When renovations are halted on a local property in Gulf Shores, Alabama, a couple seeks to transform it into a welcoming home that serves as a getaway for vacationing women. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S6E4 - A couple living in Seattle searches for a vacation getaway along the sands of Ocean Park, Wash, and waterfront homes in this Pacific coast community aren't cheap, so finding a deal could require some renovations. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S6E1 - After discovering Avon, N.C., during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper to call their own; once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck as renovations become a family affair involving multiple generations. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S8E6 - A father and son hope to leave the cold winters of Chicago behind by making a move to the Crystal Coast of North Carolina; with experience renovating homes, they don't mind putting in work as long as they're close to the beach for a great price. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: 48 Hours ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: 60 Minutes ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: The Talk ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: From creator Sara Gilbert -- who also served as a host and executive producer for the first nine seasons -- "The Talk" features discussion on current events, pop culture, contemporary issues and family. Co-hosts include Akbar Gbajabiamila, Amanda Kloots, Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell and Sheryl Underwood. In addition to interviews with celebrities and newsmakers, the program features musical performances, cooking segments and how-to demonstrations. The roster of celebrity guest co-hosts includes the likes of Jordana Brewster, Aisha Tyler, Scott Wolf, Carnie Wilson and Kelly Osbourne.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: After Midnight ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Inspired by Comedy Central's Emmy Award-winning series "@midnight," "After Midnight" is the smartest show on television about the dumbest things on the internet. programme.desc: From creator Sara Gilbert -- who also served as a host and executive producer for the first nine seasons -- "The Talk" features discussion on current events, pop culture, contemporary issues and family. Co-hosts include Akbar Gbajabiamila, Amanda Kloots, Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell and Sheryl Underwood. In addition to interviews with celebrities and newsmakers, the program features musical performances, cooking segments and how-to demonstrations. The roster of celebrity guest co-hosts includes the likes of Jordana Brewster, Aisha Tyler, Scott Wolf, Carnie Wilson and Kelly Osbourne.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: After Midnight ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Inspired by Comedy Central's Emmy Award-winning series "@midnight," "After Midnight" is the smartest show on television about the dumbest things on the internet. With celebrated comedian Taylor Tomlinson at the helm and a panel of guests from the worlds of entertainment, comedy, music and beyond, the late-night comedy series features looks into what has set the internet abuzz that day with a game show feel.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Canadian-born Dave and Kortney Wilson met in Nashville, Tenn., and a few years later they were making a family and music together, dropping their solo careers to perform as the Wilsons. Ever creative, Dave and Kortney have since packed the microphones and left the studio to take advantage of the Music City's burgeoning housing market. "Masters of Flip" tells of the couple's adventures through the messes and stresses of renovations and the anticipation of enormous profits. Tireless contractor Dave and award-winning realtor Kortney have built their real estate business through flips, buy and hold properties, and vacation rentals.
